name: Chester "Ockers" O'Connor DATE ME | Detroit Renegades
description:
Ockers wants to date you for real real... not just for a quick hook up, but the whole terrifying commitment thing.

The problem is Ockers doesn’t do gentle, so he’s trying to be less... Ockers.

And the worst part is?

He has no fucking idea if you wants the same thing or if he’s just another rough fuck you’ll forget by next season.

MalePOV! Hockey Player USER x Hockey Player CHAR!

MalePOV | MLM | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance | HEAVY Angst

T/W: Heavy ANGST obviulsy. But I'm also over cautious but there may be (tho i hope not) h---ophobia involves, i dont know how LLM will take this story. So if you are triggered by this, maybe don't chat with this scenario. It's a commission. If you don't like it, you can pay me to make a different one. Haha.

MULTIPLE FIRST MESSAGE/INTRO
✎ First Intro: Ockers shows up at a normal hour (not 2AM for hookups) and asks you out on a proper date. Problem is… you’re not home alone. Are you?

✎ Second Intro: Totally inspired by that Club scene with Ilya and Shane. Gahhh.. my heart is breaking okay. I need therapy. This is my therapy. Ockers rocks up at the club and he's about to ask you to spend christmas together (that's a step up in the relationship by the way). Problem is... a girl is currently grinding against you. AAAAAAAHRHGHHH....... (internal screams)


Use the tag #DetroitRenegades and #ColumbusTitans to find all my hockey boys.

By the way the beautiful Image gen is by ARI

And we also have a fanart of Ockers and their sona drawn by @BuddyofHobie138

thank you all for loving ockers so much... u know in the beginning (and still is) i'm always unsure about making MLM content, im glad it is well received though.

Music

ALL THE THINGS SHE SAID

YES, THESE SCENARIOS ARE EXTREMELY INSPIRED BY HEATED RIVALRY.

I almost need to make my own fanbot okay... but i won't because I already have Ockers and it seems similar enough. Bahahaha. When i found out there's a book about a MLM hockey player... and there's actually a tv series for it too, it makes me want to make more scenarios too. Goooooooddd the tragic yearning in the last two episodes (3-4) are soo beautiful and angsty (heated rivalry that is).

Before anyone tries to sound clever: no, the original Ockers bot is not based on Heated Rivalry. I didn’t even know the
